headline: Why Eli Lilly (LLY) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of global pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) jumped 2.1% in the afternoon session after the company reported positive Phase 3 data for retatrutide, its next-generation triple-agonist obesity drug.

headline: Prediction: Eli Lilly Will Trade at This Price in a Year
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) is finally acting like a trillion-dollar drugmaker again.
